summary: A low, rectangular/rounded stadium-like structure with a raised central flat floor/arena surfaced in red brick, tiered outer walls with horizontal banding, and two tall square observation towers at two corners topped by overhanging flat roofs. A short white low perimeter fence (or decorative bollards) surrounds the complex on a dirt ground plane. Stair-like stepped outer edges and glowstone lighting accent the roofline and corners.

shape.overall_form: rectangular footprint with chamfered/rounded corners and an internal large flat arena surface; outer walls are tiered in stepped horizontal bands; two tall corner towers connected at ground level by the arena base
shape.symmetry: approximate bilateral symmetry along the long axis (towers offset but similar), stepped repeating tiers create rhythm

materials.name: stonebrick
materials.role: tower edge/corners or dark vertical trim

materials.name: wood
materials.role: thin horizontal band near roof (possible wood planks)

materials.name: glowstone
materials.role: lighting on roofline and tower tops

elements: stepped tiered outer walls with at least three horizontal material bands
tall square observation towers (two) with overhanging flat roofs
glowstone lighting on roof perimeter and tower tops
short perimeter block fence/bollards around site
external stair/stepped entry on one short side
rebuild_hints: Base footprint: create a rectangular platform with chamfered/rounded corners roughly 32x40 blocks; fill interior with brick blocks for the arena floor.

Construct tiered outer walls: three horizontal bands (bottom darker stone, middle sandstone-like band, upper light/quartz band) with stepped/block-stair detailing at corners and a white vertical column at each long-side quarter.
Place glowstone at evenly spaced points along the top perimeter and on the two tower roofs; add low white perimeter blocks around whole site separated by one-block gaps (as shown).

Build two tall square towers rising from ground near corners; face towers with sandstone-like center and stonebrick vertical trim; top each tower with a multi-layer overhanging flat roof (slab edge visible) and fence railing around top.
Add a short external stepped entrance on one short side connecting ground up to arena rim using slabs/stairs and glowstone on steps.
uncertainties: Exact block types for the pale horizontal trim: identified as quartz with moderate confidence but could be white concrete or similar.
Middle and lower wall bands appear sandstone and dark stone respectively; exact variants (sandstone vs smooth sandstone, stonebrick vs andesite) uncertain.
Precise interior features under the arena floor are not visible; assumed single-level open arena.
Exact footprint dimensions are estimated from pixel views and may differ by a few blocks.
Number and placement of glowstone and fence pieces are approximate; small decorative details may vary.
